name: Italian Shrimp and Fennel Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium fennel bulb, trimmed and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over high heat.
2. Add bell pepper, fennel, half the crushed red pepper flakes, and salt to taste.
3. Cook, stirring often, until vegetables begin to brown at the edges, about 6 or 7 minutes.
4. Transfer to a mixing bowl and add half of the lemon juice.
5. Add 1 tablespoon oil to the pan. When hot, add shrimp, remaining crushed red pepper flakes, and salt to taste.
6. Cook, stirring, until shrimp are pink, about 2 to 3 minutes, adding remaining lemon juice and garlic just before removing from heat.
7. Add remaining ingredients, including the remaining half tablespoon olive oil, and mix well.
8. The salad can be served when it cools to room temperature or chilled overnight. Adjust seasoning at serving time.
